message:
fix: harden WAL sidecar cleanup and startup resilience

- Detect truncated WAL files (< 32-byte header) not just empty ones
- Clean up stale lock/WAL artifacts even when DB doesn't exist
- Improve SIGTERM→SIGKILL flow in auto_clear_db_blockers
- Display resolved database path in startup banner

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -46,6 +46,7 @@ unicode-width = "0.1.14"
 tracing.workspace = true
 tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
 nix = { workspace = true, features = ["signal", "process"] }
+fs2.workspace = true
 
 [target.'cfg(target_os = "macos")'.dependencies]
 plist = "1.8.0"
